rationale: The citing paper appears to use the 2003 paper substantively: its design note says the coffee illustration uses “the coffee example values discussed in Van Heerde, Gupta, and Wittink (2003),” and both papers focus on interpreting elasticity decompositions versus unit/competitive effects. With a direct DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.40.4.481.19386) and clear conceptual/method overlap on decomposition interpretation, this is not an obvious incidental mention.
